app.name: CVLAND PRO

home.hero_subtitle: ATS-friendly, recruiter-tested templates. Live preview, four languages, instant PDF export.
home.trust: Joined by 12,000+ candidates who landed jobs with CVLAND PRO

stats.seconds_desc: Recruiters spend just 7 seconds reviewing each CV — every second matters.
stats.callbacks_desc: ATS-optimised CVs receive 40% more interview invitations.
stats.templates_desc: Professional designs for every field — from IT to marketing.

how.title: Your CV in three steps
how.subtitle: You don't need to be a designer. Focus on the content — we handle the rest.
how.step1_desc: Choose from 30+ recruiter-tested templates that match your profession.
how.step2_desc: Complete a simple form, and let AI suggest stronger phrasing.
how.step3_desc: Export a high-quality PDF in one click and apply the same day.

features.title: Everything you need, in one place
features.subtitle: We thought through the details — you just tell your story.
features.ats_desc: Our templates are parsed cleanly by applicant tracking systems — nothing gets lost.
features.ai_desc: Improve job descriptions, skill lists and summaries with one click.
features.languages_desc: Azerbaijani, English, Russian, Turkish — one profile, multiple languages.
features.preview_desc: See exactly how your CV looks as you type — no guesswork.
features.pdf_desc: Print-ready, high quality PDF — no formatting issues.
features.free_desc: No credit card required. Build first, decide later.

templates.title: A design for every profession
templates.subtitle: From classic to modern — every template tested by real recruiters.

items.quote: Three interview invites in two weeks. With my old Word template I was getting nothing.
items.name: Aysu Mammadova

items.quote: The AI assistant rewrote my summary so well I was impressed myself. Massive time saver.
items.name: Elvin Guliyev

items.quote: Thanks to the ATS-friendly CV I finally heard back from a top company. The templates really make a difference.
items.name: Narmin Huseynli

items.a: Yes — sign up and create your first CV without any payment, then export it as PDF. Premium templates and extra features are available on an affordable plan.

items.q: What is ATS and why does it matter?
items.a: ATS (Applicant Tracking System) is software that filters CVs automatically. Our templates are optimised for these systems, so your CV reaches the recruiter.

items.q: How many languages can I use?
items.a: Four are supported today: Azerbaijani, English, Russian and Turkish. Translate your profile with a single click.
Yes. All data is encrypted at rest and never shared with third parties. You can fully delete your account at any time.
Visa, Mastercard and local bank cards. All payments are processed securely.

items.q: Can I edit my CV later?
items.a: Of course. Your CVs stay in your profile — open, edit and re-export them any time.
Yes, CVLAND PRO is fully responsive. Phone, tablet, desktop — it just works.
